name: codex-usage-monitor
description: Launch and inspect the local Codex usage monitor.

interface.shortDescription: Open a local floating widget for Codex token usage.
interface.longDescription: Codex Usage Monitor provides a small local launcher for the Codex usage floating widget, usage center, and status summary. It reads local Codex session usage collected by the dashboard tools.
defaultPrompt: Open the Codex usage floating widget.
Show my current Codex usage status.
